title: GuvFX Broker Cost Specification v1
description: Provider-independent, point-in-time broker cost and contract specification for one instrument/broker/account-type, versioned by effective date so a historical 'as-of' lookup is possible. Assumes no specific provider, broker, currency, or storage path.

schema_version.description: Contract version of this broker-cost record.

instrument_id.description: Provider-independent instrument identifier the costs apply to.

broker_id.description: Broker identity these costs/specifications belong to.

account_type.description: Account tier the costs apply to (e.g. research/paper/live).

valid_from_utc.description: Effective start of this cost version (inclusive).

valid_to_utc.description: Effective end of this cost version; null means currently open-ended.

commission_model.description: Commission model identifier (e.g. per_lot, per_trade, percent_notional).

commission_value.description: Numeric commission value interpreted per commission_model.

commission_currency.description: Currency the commission_value is denominated in.

swap_long.description: Swap/financing applied to long positions; nullable when not applicable/unknown.

swap_short.description: Swap/financing applied to short positions; nullable when not applicable/unknown.

contract_size.description: Units of the underlying per one contract/lot.

tick_value.description: Monetary value of one tick per contract.

source_object_id.description: Logical reference to the immutable raw source object these costs were derived from.

source_object_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the immutable raw source object.

quality_flags.description: Quality/lineage markers for this cost record. Empty array means none.

limitations.description: Known limitations or caveats (e.g. fields not covered, assumed). Empty array means none stated.
